captions.text: The article goes deeper on when each fits.

lines.text: Quick aside: the panel you just watched is one of three common shapes. There’s the structured debate, exactly two sides trading rebuttals, good for genuinely binary questions. And there’s the judge-only variant: several agents answer independently, no shared thread, a judge picks or merges the best. Cheaper and parallel, but you lose the rebuttals. The article goes deeper on when each fits. Today we stick with the panel.
